title: Alternate Gunpowder
description: Obtaining gunpowder without needing Creeper Farms!
body:
This is my first Minecraft mod!

This mod gives players another way to obtain gunpowder without the need for Creepers.

**Important: Check Gallery for Recipes**

## Why?

In Minecraft, there is **mainly** only two ways to obtain gunpowder: **Creepers** and **Ghasts**. While you can make a Creeper Farm, that's usaully an end-game/post-game player would do, when the main use for gunpowder is Rockets. It's also a rather static method for gunpowder. And Ghasts are pretty risky, given some can spwan over lava, where it can drop the gunpowder in lava. Thus, making the gunpowder for naught.

I wanted to try and give players a more dynamic way of obtaining gunpowder, and letting them explore more of the world of Minecraft. That's what this mod aims to do.

By putting a coal or charcoal in the crafting table, the coal is crushed into black powder. Black powder is a necessary component for gunpowder.

![Black Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b61a2ef9667cc01e709e9b92185486e7f69748a0.png)

To craft gunpowder, you'll need one black powder and one blaze powder.

![Craftable Gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0288d90aa3a2b2fa4a77c4104a10c9017d14e8fb.png)

With this mod, you should have an easier time crafting gunpowder-related things, like TNT and rockets.

## Depenencies?
None.

## Can I reupload?
No reuploads.

## Backport and/or Fabric version?
Depends on my free time. I'm a college student, so time is rather limited.
